decision.presenterLine: Layer 4 was a hard-cuttable stretch and is cut for this demo. The live proof is Layers 1-3: typed graph mutations, dependency tracking, and structural replanning.

demoPath.name: Clean Layers 1-3 hero path

heroMoments.name: Balance change invalidates and replans
proof: balance transfer commits as typed graph mutations
revision 2 becomes current and revision 1 is superseded

heroMoments.name: Layer 4 ingestion and verifier
heroMoments.replacement: Use the mutation sidebar and revision history from Hero Moment 1 to show the same coordination claim on shipped code.

runOfShow.label: Reset or confirm the seeded demo persona
Create the Tokyo rewards plan from the typed graph seed
Show the plan revision, steps, and state dependencies
Stream or replay graph mutation events in the sidebar
Transfer Chase UR to Hyatt and trigger structural invalidation

fallbacks.trigger: SSE disconnects or the sidebar misses frames
fallbacks.action: Use GET /mutations?after=<lastEventId> for REST catch-up; if needed, replay fixtures/mock-mutation-events.json and label it as the same Layers 1-3 event contract.

fallbacks.trigger: Live API or Postgres is unavailable during rehearsal
fallbacks.action: Use fixtures/mock-plan.json and fixtures/mock-mutation-events.json as a clearly labeled replay of the shipped contract, then keep Layer 4 cut.

successChecks: Demo starts from the fixed seeded persona and Tokyo trip scenario.
The shown path includes plan creation, typed mutation events, balance transfer, stale or superseded revision, and the new current revision.
No demo step requires Layer 4 ingestion, verifier approval, mutation proposals, or global mutation events.
If asked about Layer 4, the presenter says it was cut and points back to the stronger Layers 1-3 proof.
